name: roth_vs_traditional
description: Roth vs Traditional — Compares Roth vs Traditional retirement contributions: the break-even retirement tax rate and which to choose. Returns a one-line verdict plus a link to the full interactive page with the numbers pre-filled. Accepts only numbers and enums.

name: best_filing_status
description: Married Filing Jointly vs Separately — Compares Married Filing Jointly vs Separately for a couple and says which keeps more, including lost credits. Returns a one-line verdict plus a link to the full interactive page with the numbers pre-filled. Accepts only numbers and enums.

name: raise_bonus_value
description: Raise / Bonus True Value — Shows how much of a raise or bonus you actually keep after marginal tax and lifestyle inflation. Returns a one-line verdict plus a link to the full interactive page with the numbers pre-filled. Accepts only numbers and enums.
